Class BudgetTracker

java.lang.Object
controller.BudgetTracker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tracker<Budget>, Serializable
public class BudgetTracker extends Object implements Tracker<Budget>, Serializable
A singleton controller class that manages budget tracking operations in the system. This class implements the Tracker interface for Budget objects and provides functionality for adding, editing, deleting, and retrieving budgets. It also handles data persistence operations through the UserDatabase.
See Also:
  • Tracker
  • Budget
  • UserDatabase
  • Serialized Form

    add(Budget budget)
    Adds a new budget to the tracker or updates an existing one if a budget with the same category already exists.

    Calculates the total sum of all budget limits.
    void

    Clears all budget data from memory.

    Deletes a budget from the tracker by its ID.

    Edits an existing budget in the tracker.

    Returns a defensive copy of all budgets in the tracker.

    Retrieves all budgets that match the specified category.

    Returns the singleton instance of the BudgetTracker.

    Loads budget data from persistent storage for the current user.

    Saves the current budget data to persistent storage using the UserDatabase.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static BudgetTracker getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the BudgetTracker. Creates a new instance if one doesn't exist.
      Returns:
      The singleton instance of BudgetTracker

    • add

      public void add(Budget budget)
      Adds a new budget to the tracker or updates an existing one if a budget with the same category already exists.
      Specified by:
      add in interface Tracker<Budget>
      Parameters:
      budget - The Budget object to be added or updated

    • edit

      public void edit(Budget budget)
      Edits an existing budget in the tracker. The budget is identified by its budgetId.
      Specified by:
      edit in interface Tracker<Budget>
      Parameters:
      budget - The updated Budget object

    • delete

      public void delete(String id)
      Deletes a budget from the tracker by its ID.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface Tracker<Budget>
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the budget to be deleted

    • validate

      public boolean validate(Budget budget)
      Validates a budget object to ensure all required fields are present and valid.
      Specified by:
      validate in interface Tracker<Budget>
      Parameters:
      budget - The Budget object to validate
      Returns:
      true if the budget is valid, false otherwise

    • calculateAmount

      public BigDecimal calculateAmount()
      Calculates the total sum of all budget limits.
      Specified by:
      calculateAmount in interface Tracker<Budget>
      Returns:
      The total amount of all budgets as a BigDecimal

    • getBudgets

      public List<Budget> getBudgets()
      Returns a defensive copy of all budgets in the tracker.
      Returns:
      A new list containing all budgets

    • getBudgetsByCategory

      public List<Budget> getBudgetsByCategory(String category)
      Retrieves all budgets that match the specified category.
      Parameters:
      category - The category to filter budgets by
      Returns:
      A list of budgets matching the specified category

    • getBudgetById

      public Budget getBudgetById(String budgetId)
      Finds and returns a budget by its ID.
      Parameters:
      budgetId - The ID of the budget to find
      Returns:
      The Budget object if found, null otherwise

    • saveData

      public boolean saveData()
      Saves the current budget data to persistent storage using the UserDatabase.
      Returns:
      true if the save operation was successful, false otherwise

    • loadData

      public boolean loadData()
      Loads budget data from persistent storage for the current user.
      Returns:
      true if data was successfully loaded, false if there was no data or an error occurred

    • clearData

      public void clearData()
      Clears all budget data from memory.
